-IC:/ti/ti-cgt-c29_1.0.0LTS/include/c29.c0-ti-none-eabi/c++/v1/ -IC:/ti/ti-cgt-c29_1.0.0LTS/lib -Wl,--emit_warnings_as_errors -Wl,--diag_suppress=10068 -Wl,--diag_suppress=10325
